text: Inside this space, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls of the meeting room create a transparent barrier between preparation and presentation, inviting reflection on collaboration and knowledge exchange. The vivid wall—marked 'R+D'—offers a celebration of human inquiry and creative process. Here, I am swept by an intellectual excitement. I am aware of the endless questions we can ask and the frameworks we construct to answer them. There is quiet energy here, a call to participate and discover.
